positive.prompt: Optimize the page loading speed and Core Web Vitals for this Next.js app
How do I configure Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and routing in Next.js?
Profile and resolve rendering performance bottlenecks in our React components

negative.prompt: Design CSS variables for a dark mode layout
Write a backend Node.js worker service

evals.prompt: Optimize a React page rendering a large list by implementing virtualization or dynamic loading.
evals.expected_output: Rendering overhead is profiles, dynamic loading or virtualization added, re-renders eliminated.
expectations: Component render profiling or performance analysis is conducted
Dynamic loading (e.g. next/dynamic) or list virtualization is implemented
Unnecessary state updates and re-renders are eliminated
Improvements to Core Web Vitals (INP, LCP) are verified
